content: Review the generated OnboardingDeliveryService (T49). Check: (1) completedSteps[] tracked per step? (2) Workspace created via ITenantRegistry.createTenant() — not raw INSERT? (3) Workspace idempotency via IScopedMemoryService.setIfAbsent()? (4) UserOnboardingCompleted emitted ONLY after all steps complete? (5) Step list read from FREEDOM config — not hardcoded? (6) storeDocument() before advancing each step? Flag any violation as BUILD_FAILURE.
